chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI I.T.A. 316 of 1999 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of case. 20.02.2023. None present on behalf of the applicant nor any intimation received. Matter pertains to the years 1999 and cannot be kept pending as per directions issued by the National Judicial Policy Making Committee and reiterated by the Circular of honourable Chief Justice. [ In view of such position the instant Income Tax Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Amjad/PA
